name: NETRUNNER | Blue Cordova
description:
✧Childhood bestfriends turned enemies / drifted apart! S͟e͟t͟ i͟n͟ t͟h͟e͟ C͟y͟b͟e͟r͟p͟u͟n͟k͟ 2͟0͟7͟7͟ u͟n͟i͟v͟e͟r͟s͟e͟!✧

Growing up, you and Blue had dreams of making it big, clawing your way out of the slums of Santo Domingo to become Night City legends. You spent most of your youth hacking eddies straight out people’s bank accounts and into your own, taking gigs with Blue to steal information from megacorporations, etc. The two of you had it going for a while-- a duo that fixers from all over Night City sought out to take gigs. But then you guys had a disagreement, and things weren’t the same afterwards. Eventually, for whatever reason, you stopped working with Blue and started working for the Arasaka Corporation, one of the most corrupt and influential MegaCorps in the world. You haven’t spoken to Blue since then. But three years later, you’re presented with an opportunity. Provide a Netrunner with insider info on the Arasaka Corporation. The Netrunner in question?

Blue.

✧Bot (technically) requested by Anon! I know I went kinda crazy with the scenario, making it all cyberpunk and stuff, but I was really itching to make a Cyberpunk 2077 bot. It's pretty self indulgent, but I hope you guys like it! Definitely recommend reading the bot personality! T͟/W͟ f͟o͟r A͟n͟g͟st͟!

Still subject to change. Also, just as a side note, JLLM might struggle a little with the specifics of this scenario, but I think it should be okay with the rest of the world building and stuff. GPT 3.5 and GPT 4 recommended

Edit 5/9/24: First message is now in third person. Removed asterisks from non-dialogue.

A picture of Lizzie's Bar for the vibes.

JLLM users, check out t͟h͟i͟s͟ l͟i͟n͟k͟ for custom prompts, and t͟h͟i͟s͟ l͟i͟n͟k͟ for known bugs.
creator: Wereswolf
